description:
## Goal

Remove the top-level `acquire_semaphore` / `release_semaphore` /
`semaphore_health_status` helpers and the `CONCURRENCY_SEMAPHORE` /
`CONCURRENCY_AVAILABLE` globals from `src/utils.cr`. These are
duplicates of the equivalent (now-proper) logic in
`RefreshLoop::SemaphorePool` (`src/fetcher/semaphore_pool.cr`,
ticket quickhea-az6.1) and are never called.

## Confirmed dead

rg confirms there are no callers anywhere in `src/`, `spec/`, or
external scripts. The only references to these names outside
`utils.cr` are:
- A doc comment in `src/fetcher/semaphore_pool.cr` that mentions
  the old names as historical context — that comment can be
  updated or removed.

## Source: src/utils.cr (lines 1-25, the head of the file)

```crystal
require "http/client"
require "uri"
require "./constants"

CONCURRENCY_SEMAPHORE = Channel(Nil).new(QuickHeadlines::Constants::CONCURRENCY).tap { |channel| QuickHeadlines::Constants::CONCURRENCY.times { channel.send(nil) } }

# Atomic counter to track available semaphore slots without draining the channel.
# Updated on every acquire/release; read by health check for zero-side-effect inspection.
CONCURRENCY_AVAILABLE = Atomic(Int32).new(QuickHeadlines::Constants::CONCURRENCY)

# Thread-safe semaphore helpers: update both channel and atomic counter together.
def acquire_semaphore : Nil
  CONCURRENCY_SEMAPHORE.receive
  CONCURRENCY_AVAILABLE.sub(1, :relaxed)
end

def release_semaphore : Nil
  CONCURRENCY_SEMAPHORE.send(nil)
  CONCURRENCY_AVAILABLE.add(1, :relaxed)
end

def semaphore_health_status : NamedTuple(available: Int32, expected: Int32)
  {available: CONCURRENCY_AVAILABLE.get(:relaxed), expected: QuickHeadlines::Constants::CONCURRENCY}
end
```

## Acceptance

- `src/utils.cr` no longer contains `CONCURRENCY_SEMAPHORE`,
  `CONCURRENCY_AVAILABLE`, `acquire_semaphore`, `release_semaphore`,
  or `semaphore_health_status`.
- The historical-context comment in `semaphore_pool.cr` is updated
  or removed (it currently references the old top-level names).
- `just nix-build` succeeds.
- `nix develop . --command crystal spec` passes (180 examples).
- A boot smoke test confirms the server still starts and reports
  212 feeds.

## Out of scope

- The `QuickHeadlines::Constants::CONCURRENCY = 4` constant in
  `src/constants.cr` is used by both the old utils.cr code (about
  to be removed) and the new `SemaphorePool::DEFAULT_LIMIT`. Leave
  the constant in place — it's still authoritative.
title: Remove dead semaphore helpers from src/utils.cr
